structural_match.detail: 13/13 structural checks match baseline exactly: semantic domains 17, structural groups 13, backed 5, semantic-only 12, clusters 5, zones 1, PZ-001, DOM-04/backend_app_root, PSIG-001/002/004 active, PSIG-006 baseline, PSIG-003/005 not activated.

decision_match.detail: Score=60, band=CONDITIONAL, posture=INVESTIGATE. Matches baseline exactly.

report_generation_clean.detail: All 9 reports generated by generator. T2 via generator (no patch). No manual intervention.

content_identity.detail: Unified diff confirms: rerun reports differ from baseline only in navigation href run_id values (expected). Zero non-runid differences. Content body is bit-for-bit identical.

no_drift.detail: No semantic drift. No new content. No removed content. Generator produces deterministic output from same artifact inputs.

no_patching.detail: No manual HTML patches applied. T2 fully generator-driven. DEV-T2-VAULT dependency eliminated.

verdict_basis: All 5 reproducibility criteria satisfied. System produces content-identical output across independent runs. graph_state.json MD5 is identical — d3-force simulation is deterministic given same vault topology. Navigation hrefs differ by run_id (expected and correct).
